PETITIONERS P&P INDUSTRIES LLC , A VERMONT LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, AND JT3CAPITAL LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD [ADDED FOR POSTING OF PART 2 OF 2 OF THE TENTATIVE RULING]
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Terry Anderlini, Esq. and Atty. Ira Leshin, Esq. of Anderlini & McSweeney LLP (tel: 650-212-0001); and Atty. Jesse Miller, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (tel: 415-732-1163) for the Petitioners.
Atty. Timothy Flaherty, Esq. and Atty. David Perl, Esq. of Clark Hill (tel: 415-984-8538); and Atty. Anthony Laporte, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Hanszen Laporte (tel: 713-522-9444) for the Respondents.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER P&P INDUSTRIES LLC, AND JT3CAPITAL LLC's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Court reporter: Angie Diner, CSR# 9581 (tel: 415-748-4030 / email: angiediner@gmail.com). (301/CVA)

***** Minute order amended on 8/13/2025 to reflect the following disclosure: Judge Van Aken discloses that she serves on the board of the Association of Business Trial Lawyers, Northern California Chapter. Hon. James P. Kleinberg (Ret.) is also a member of that board. *****
